## Description

<!-- What does this PR do? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] chore: Maintenance
- [ ] docs: Documentation
- [ ] test: Test changes
- [ ] ci: CI/CD changes

## Quality Checklist

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes (lint + format + type-check)
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in code
- [ ] README updated if needed
